text: Blackjack is an exciting card game loosely based on the more familiar Pond 2. To win at Blackjack
the player must achieve a higher total than the dealer without going over 21. In this video we
will show the basic rules of Blackjack and how it is played. Before every game of Blackjack the cards
are shuffled. Here we see six decks with the crew here using a riffle shuffle to mix up the cards.
This shuffle has been simplified for this tutorial. Once shuffled the cards are then offered to the
player to be cut. The crew here then places the second cutting card towards the back of the deck.
Once this card comes out the cards are reshuffled before the next game of Blackjack.
Here we see how to bet on Blackjack. The crew here will deal to each box that contains a bet,
in this case three boxes. The crew here deals two cards to each box and one card to herself.
The player can stick with the hand they have been dealt or take a card and try and get closer
to 21. If the player goes over 21 he busts and loses his bet. In this example,
the player has bust on his first two hands. He draws a card on his last hand and makes 18.
The crew here then draws her card. She must draw until she makes a hand or until she busts. In this
hand she busts and pays the player. With all bets settled a new hand can begin and the process begins again.
